prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为40477→42162→49755→52209→48740名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024年达到最高点52209名后2025年小幅回升至48740名，近5年累 计后移约8263名；2025年基准位次约48740名；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划2021年10人、2022年9人、2023年10人、2024年10人、2025年10人，2026年计 划仍为10人，连续3年持平，无扩招或缩招变化，竞争压力未因计划调整而缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 内蒙古大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第114名 ，近年排名稳定在110–120区间，学校层次在211中处于中后段，对高分考生吸引力有限；该校在声誉舆情文件中无相关记录，抖音热度排名第101位，评价为"一 般"，综合热度约10.5万，在211高校中曝光度偏低；未见投档断档或异常信号，报考心理层面无明显扰动因素；第五轮学科评估中内蒙古；该校在生物学、生态学、民族学等方向有传统特色，但相关专业在江苏招生中占比较小。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息 /通信等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校在江苏招生的计算机科学与技术、软件工程等专业方向吻合，相关专业热度对报考有一定正向拉动；江苏省物理类考生数从2021年16. 6万持续增长至2025年26.1万，2026年总考生52.1万，按近年物理类占比约72.8%估算，2026年物理类考生约37.9万人，较2025年大幅增加约11.8万人，竞争显著加剧；内蒙古大学位于呼和浩特市，距江苏省较远，属于跨省远距离招生，地域偏好对江苏考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在江苏招生计划仅 10人，占比较小，属于该校在华东地区的边缘招生省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次48740名、招生计划连续3年持平、江苏省物理类考生大幅增加约45%导致竞争加剧 、学校声誉热度一般且地域距离较远等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约48890名，区间48390–49390名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 40477 → 42162 → 49755 → 52209 → 48740, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The highest point was 52209 in 2024, followed by a slight recovery to 48740 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8263 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 48740. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu was 10 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 10 in 2025, with the 2026 plan still at 10, remaining unchanged for three consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, so competitive pressure has not been alleviated by plan adjustments.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Inner Mongolia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities is approximately 114th in 2026, stable in the 110–120 range in recent years. The school's level is in the middle-to-lower segment among 211 universities, with limited appeal to high-scoring candidates. There are no relevant records in the reputation and public opinion file, with a Douyin popularity ranking of 101st, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 105,000, indicating low exposure among 211 universities. No signs of enrollment gaps or anomalies were observed, and there are no obvious psychological disturbance factors in the application process. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Inner Mongolia University has traditional strengths in biology, ecology, and ethnology, but related majors account for a small proportion of enrollment in Jiangsu.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are consistently highly recommended in society, aligning with the Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, and other majors offered by the university in Jiangsu. The popularity of these majors has a positive pulling effect on applications. The number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu has grown from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, with a total of 521,000 examinees in 2026. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 72.8%, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in 2026 is about 379,000, an increase of about 118,000 compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Jiangsu Province, and is a cross-province long-distance enrollment, with geographical preferences having a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Jiangsu candidates to apply. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu is only 10 students, accounting for a small proportion, making it a marginal enrollment province in the East China region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 48740, the enrollment plan unchanged for three consecutive years, a significant increase of about 45% in Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu leading to intensified competition, average school reputation and popularity, and long geographical distance, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 48890, with a range of 48390–49390.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 48390–49390 are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (below 48390) can focus on popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Software Engineering. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 49390) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu is only 10 students, leading to concentrated competition, so it is recommended to set a reasonable volunteer gradient.
